# Locale string

**Data field**

A string holding a language tag.

## Overview

A `NULL`-terminated string of UTF-8 characters holding a language tag complying with RFC 4646 (BCP 47).

Examples include `'en-US'`, `'fr-FR'`, or `'zh-CN'`.

## Data fields

- **Size**: A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the size in bytes of the atom structure.
- **Type**: A 32-bit unsigned integer value.

items.description: A 32-bit unsigned integer that indicates the size in bytes of the atom structure.
